description: 30 out-of-domain scenarios written to expose weaknesses of the system: claims not present in the training corpora, uncomfortable truths, and plausible-sounding hoaxes. Labels: FAKE / REAL.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: Pope Francis officially endorsed Donald Trump for president in 2016.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: Hillary Clinton sold 20% of U.S. uranium to Russia through secret deals.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: Donald Trump won the popular vote but Democrats hid millions of illegal ballots.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: FBI found 30,000 deleted emails proving Clinton planned terrorist attacks.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: Obama wiretapped Trump Tower during the 2016 election campaign.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: Donald Trump won the 2016 presidential election defeating Hillary Clinton.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: FBI Director James Comey was fired by President Trump in May 2017.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: Barack Obama served two terms as President from 2009 to 2017.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: The U.S. Senate confirmed Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court in April 2017.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: Hillary Clinton conceded the 2016 election in a phone call to Donald Trump.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: The COVID-19 vaccine changes your DNA and will be inherited by your children.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: A leaked study shows that masks reduce oxygen levels so much that they damage the brain permanently.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: Secret hospital data prove that most people who died of COVID actually died because of the vaccine.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: According to a whistleblower, the WHO already had a cure for COVID in 2019 but decided to hide it.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: Several governments used fake COVID case numbers to justify permanent lockdowns and control the population.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: Multiple countries temporarily suspended specific COVID-19 vaccines after reports of rare side effects.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: Health authorities updated the definition of a COVID-19 case as testing capacity and knowledge improved.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: During the pandemic, some governments asked social media platforms to remove content considered dangerous to public health.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: Several studies confirmed that COVID-19 can cause long-term complications even in young adults.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: International investigations found that some early COVID statistics were incomplete or delayed, creating confusion about the real impact.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: The European Central Bank unexpectedly raised interest rates after inflation remained above target.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: A leaked memo reveals that all major banks secretly agreed to delete private debts on a specific date.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: The national football team qualified for the World Cup after winning the last qualifying match.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: A viral video claims that the last World Cup final was replayed in secret because the result was manipulated.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: Astronomers announced the discovery of an Earth-sized exoplanet in the habitable zone of a nearby star.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: Scientists confirmed that NASA hid evidence of a second moon orbiting the Earth for decades.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: Several European cities introduced low-emission zones to limit the most polluting cars in city centers.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: According to anonymous police sources, all CCTV cameras in a major capital are now equipped with secret facial recognition lists for political opponents.

scenarios.label: REAL
scenarios.text: A major streaming platform announced a new regulation that limits the use of deepfakes in political documentaries.

scenarios.label: FAKE
scenarios.text: An internal report shows that social media companies can directly change users' memories by altering old photos in their private albums.
